name: Potato Soup with Butter Dumplings
recipeInstructions:
Melt the butter in a large soup pot; add onion and sauté until tender. Add water, then bring to a boil and add potatoes, celery, salt, pepper, and parsley. Reduce heat and simmer for 15 minutes. Drop dumpling batter into the soup by spoonfuls. Cover and simmer for another 10 minutes. Remove from heat and gradually stir in sour cream. Heat thoroughly, but do not boil.
Dumpling Batter:
Cream the butter with flour; beat in eggs. Stir in seasonings, mixing well. Yield: about 1/2 cup.
